Poll Log (last 30 runs)
⚠️ Rate limit errors detected in log. RC's Heavy API is throttled (~40 req/min). The server now staggers polls: 75 s startup offset + 3-min interval + backoff retry. If still failing, the errors should clear within one poll cycle.

📣
Team Announcement
From Ronnie · Starting this week

Hey team 👋 Starting this week, every Friday, Ronnie will check in to see who's available for weekend support (Saturday or Sunday, anytime between 7 AM – 7 PM CST).

✅ Completely voluntary — no pressure at all
💰 Any weekend shift counts as overtime under our existing policy
Just reply with your preferred shift window when Ronnie pings you Fridays

We'll only call people in if there's a volume spike that weekend. If it's normal, no one gets called in.

If we don't get enough volunteers, 2 agents will be assigned on rotation to ensure coverage — fair and tracked so the same people aren't picked repeatedly.

🙂 Volunteering ahead = you pick your window
vs. being assigned a shift. Always the better option!

📧 Send Break Report
